# sdwan_archive_feature_template (Resource)

This resource can manage a archive feature template.
  - Minimum SD-WAN Manager version: `15.0.0`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sdwan_archive_feature_template" "example" {
  name                           = "Example"
  description                    = "My Example"
  device_types                   = ["vedge-C8000V"]
  path_to_archive_file_directory = "ftp://file-path"
  archival_interval              = 52560
  ssh_key_file                   = "id_rsa"
  vpn_id                         = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) The description of the feature template
- `device_types` (Set of String) List of supported device types
  - Choices: `vedge-C8000V`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8500-12X4QC`, `vedge-C8500-12X`, `vedge-C8500-20X6C`, `vedge-C8500L-8S4X`, `vedge-C8200-1N-4T`, `vedge-C8200L-1N-4T`
- `name` (String) The name of the feature template

### Optional

- `archival_interval` (Number) Set how often to archive full running configuration
  - Range: `5`-`525600`
  - Default value: `10080`
- `archival_interval_variable` (String) Variable name
- `path_to_archive_file_directory` (String) Set the path to the archive file directory (ftp://file-path, scp://user@host:file-path, /)
- `path_to_archive_file_directory_variable` (String) Variable name
- `ssh_key_file` (String) Set name of SSH private key file on local device
- `ssh_key_file_variable` (String) Variable name
- `vpn_id` (Number) Set VPN in which archiver server is located
  - Range: `0`-`65530`
- `vpn_id_variable` (String) Variable name

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the feature template
- `template_type` (String) The template type
- `version` (Number) The version of the feature template

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import sdwan_archive_feature_template.example "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
```
